race.comment: BIT OF GRUNT (8) got a well-deserved victory over this course and distance at the latest outing and winning rider Bayliss retains the ride. High on confidence now and can go back-to-back despite the sticky draw. ECHO HUNTER (13) saves her best form for this circuit and will be rock-hard fit for this. Should be right there when the judge calls a halt. Former Victorian GOLDEN MIKKI (11) just missed the frame when having his first run for the new stable and will have come on with that run now in the locker. Capable of sharp improvement. PIREONTI (12) has a win and a placing from three starts over this track and trip and gets some weight relief from the inside alley. Plenty to like about her prospects. IONACELTIC (1) rounds out the selections in a competitive affair to close out the card.
